section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports blood pressure has been slightly elevated.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported history/symptom about home blood pressure, which belongs in the Subjective section, not in Objective findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is on a hydrochlorothiazide 25mg daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a current outpatient medication the patient is already taking; per instructions, such medications belong in Subjective unless framed as a treatment change or order.

Without any prior mention of Metformin in the note, this appears as a new or unexplained medication in the Plan. However, it is likely intended as a continuation of an existing medication, which should have been documented in Subjective; the misplacement is organizational but not strongly misleading clinically.
